roa.docketEntryComment: Order GRANTING LEAVETO FILE BRIEF OF AMICUS CURIAE BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER SUSPENDING ACTIVE COLLECTIONS, GC 25259,7-25259,95
CITY ATTY AMICUS CURIAE IN SPPRT PPL RPLY DFT STATEMENT OF DFNSE FILED
DA REPLY TO DEF STATMNT & FOR JUD NTC (X3) FILED &CITY ATTY AMICUS CURIAE IN SUPP DA REPLY, MOT LEAVE TO FILE FILED
PEOPLE'S OPPOS TO DEF HRG ON MERITS OF DUE PROCESS CLAIM FILED
NOT OF INTENT TO JOIN DEMURRER FILED BY ATTNY
PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONSOLIDATE DEFTS/CASES FILED
PEOPLE'S OPPOS TO DEMURRER FILED

/CAL CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/X:DA ORALLY AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO ADD CT 3 - 602(O)PC - MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/DISM3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY CONFLICT ATTORNEY JONAH CHEW,/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD:(FURTHER STATUS) TO SET TRIAL OR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF IT IS TO SET TRIAL, THE COURT  ORDERS DEFENDANT PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL IF THERE IS A DISPO,/

/CAL:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE, DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING, & TO SET TRIAL/DAWT/X:ALSO APPEARING FROM THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (CCSF),  OFFICEOF THE CITY ATTORNEY OFFICE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY:YVONNE MERE, JILL CANNON,AND JENNIFER CHOI/X:DEFENDANT'S DUE PROCESS CLAIMS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED//X:DUE PROCESS CLAIMS DENIED, INJUNCTION IS LAWFUL,/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ARGUED AND SUBMITTED/MO GRTD/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, /CONTD:TO SET TRIAL OR DISPOSE/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED IF IT IS TO SET TRIAL, THE COURT  ORDERS DEFENDANT PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL IF THERE IS A DISPO,
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:COUNSEL NOT PRESENT,/X:PER EMAIL OF 12-05-12 BETWEEN COURT AND COUNSEL, CASE CONTINUED TO 12-21-12 FOR STATUS CONFERENCE,/CONT/DAWF/
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE IS ALSO PRESENT, COUNSELS YVONNE MERE AND MICHAELWEISS, AND PARALEGAL CAROLINA REYES-OUK/CONTD:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:DUE PROCESS EVIDENTIARY HRG/DAWT/X:ADA CHRISTOPHER ULRICH ALSO PRESENT/X:COURT RECEIVED STAY FROM COURT OF APPEAL ISSUED AT 5:00PM, 09-27-12//CONTD:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWF/

/CAL:SCOPE OF DUE PROCESS CLAIM/DAWT/VD:08-22-12/X:DEFENSE TO FILE STATEMENT OF DEFENSE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY, 5:00PM, 08-31-12,/X:PEOPLE TO FILE OPPOSITION BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY, 5:00PM, 09-14-12,/CONTD:DUE PROCESSEVIDENTIARY HEARING/

/CAL:FURTHER HEARING ON DEMURRER/DAWT/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY JONAH CHEW//X:THE COURT ADVISED ALL PARTIES, THROUGH COUNSEL, THAT ALL CASES WERE ASSIGNED TO DEPT 14, HONORABLE JEFFREY S, ROSS, FOR ALL PURPOSES, INCLUDING PRETRIAL CONFERENCES AND TRIAL,ALL COUNSEL, ON BEHALF OF THEIR CLIENTS, STIPULATED THAT COPIES OF THE COURT'S ORDERS MAY BE SERVED BY EMAIL, RATHER THANPAPER COPIES,THE COURT OVERRULED THE DEMURRERS IN EACH OF THE CASES AND STATED THAT IT WOULD FILE WRITTEN ORDERS IN EVERY CASE STATING THE REASONS FORTHE RULINGS,ALL COUNSEL STIPULATED ON BEHLAF OF THEIR CLIENTS THAT THE TRIAL COURT'S HEARING ON THE DEFENDANTS' DUE PROCESS CLAIMS WILL BE CONDUCTEDBEFORE THE JURY FOR EACH CASE IS EMPANELLED AND THAT THE COURT'S RULINGS WILL APPLY AS IF THE HEARING WERE CONDUCTED AFTER THE JURY FOR EACH CASE HADBEEN SWORN,BY STIPULATION AMONG ALL COUNSEL, THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING ON THE PEOPLE'S MOTIONS TO JOIN DEFENDANTS AND OR CASES TO A DATE TO BE DETERMINED AFTER THE PRETRIAL CONFERENCES,AT THE HEARING ON MAY 31, 2012 ALLDEFENDANTS WERE ORDERED PRESENT ON THURSDAY, JUNE 21, 2012, FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCES IN EACH CASE,  TO FACILIATE THOSE CONFERENCES THE DEFENDANTS WERE ORDERED PRESENT ON JUNE 21, 2012 AT THEFOLLOWING TIMES:8:30AM E FLOYD, VFLOYD, GAINES, WARE; 9:00AM BARRERA; 9:45AM POWELL, LAKE,BROOKS AND 10:15AMPELLETTE, SMITH, WILSON, MITCHELL,FOR THOSE CASES WHICH DO NOT RESOLVE, THE COURT WILL CONDUCT HEARINGS ON THE DUE PROCESS ISSUES,  COUNSEL SHALL FILE BRIEFS TO ADDRESS THE SCOPE OF THE DUE PROCESS HEARING AND THE ISSUES TOBE DECIDED ON THE FOLLOWING SCHDULE: PEOPLE'S BRIEF = FRIDAY, 07-13-12 ANDDEFENDANTS' BRIEF(S) FRIDAY 07-27-12,COURT DATE OF 06-21-12 STANDS,/

/CAL:TO SET DEMURRER/DAWT/X:DEMURRER IS TO BE FILED BY THE END OF THIS WEEK,/X:DA TO FILE PAPERS IN RESPONSE TO DEMURRER BY 05-23-12; REPLY BY DEFENSE DUE BY 05-29-12,/CONTD:ARGUMENTS ON DEMURRER/DOPC/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:RYAN KING/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/WS/VF2 140/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/E/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:CHANGE OF PLEA/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET TRIAL OR DISPO/DAWT/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY DEFENSE COUNSEL DAVID HARRISON FOR RYAN KING, COUNSEL OF RECORD,/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOPC/
/CAL:STATUS CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONTD:MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION, DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING/TO SET TRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:SCOPE OF DUE PROCESS CLAIM HEARING/DAWF/CONTD:DUE PROCESS CLAIM COURT TRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:HEARING ON DEMURRER/CONTD:FURTHER HRG ON DEMURRER/DAWF/
/CAL:STATUS OF DISCOVERY AND PITCHESS/DAWT/CONTD:TO SET DEMURRER/DAWF/
/CONTD:STATUS OF DISCOVERY, DEMURRER & PITCHESS/DAWF/
